text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear Gold Ship's voice coming from the roof one
day and decide to investigate.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Not to worry... You're safe now.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Once again, I've managed to protect the
academy from the threat beyond the stars...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It sure took a lot out of me, though... Recovering
is gonna take a while...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know about the threat beyond the stars,
but Gold Ship's exhaustion seems real. It takes
her a while to get back in form.
